We will be focusing on the years between 1299 and 1453, here is what that looks like on our timeline. So far in this class we have talked about the first, second and third crusade. But we have not talked about the disastrous fourth crusade. This crusade was organized to attack the Egyptians. But they got involved in a Byzantine Civil War and attacked Constantinople instead.
paragraphs.zh: 大家好，欢迎回到中世纪系列的最 后一讲。今天我们要学习奥斯曼土 耳其人。 我们将重点关注 1299 年到 1453 年 之间的年份，这是这个时间段在时 间轴上的样子。 到目前为止，我们已经讨论了第一 次，第二次和第三次十字军东征。 但我们还没有谈到灾难性的第四 次十字军东征。这次十字军东征的 目的是攻击埃及人。 但他们卷入了拜占庭内战，转而进 攻君士坦丁堡。

paragraphs.en: The Byzantines were demoralized and had bad leadership. So the crusaders were able to sail their ships up against the sea walls and enter the city that way. Originally they had attacked Constantinople on behalf of a Byzantine Emperor who was fighting a Civil War with another Emperor. But once they got inside Constantinople, they decided to sack the city. The sacking of Constantinople was devastating to the city. Much of the great art was stolen by the Venetians who were transporting the Crusaders, and about 900,000 silver marks were pillaged from the city, and a fire was started that left 15,000 people homeless. Afterwards the Crusaders
paragraphs.zh: 拜占庭人士气低落，领导不力。这 样一来，十字军就能把他们的船靠 在海堤上，从那条路进城。 起初，他们是代表拜占庭皇帝进攻 君士坦丁堡的，当时拜占庭皇帝正 在和另一个皇帝进行内战。但他们 一进入君士坦丁堡，他们就决定洗 劫这座城市。 君士坦丁堡的沦陷对这座城市的 打击是毁灭性的。许多伟大的艺术 品都被运送十字军的威尼斯人偷 走了，大约 90 万枚银币被洗劫一 空，一场大火导致 1.5 万人无家可 归。 后来十字军建立了拉丁帝国的十

paragraphs.en: established the Crusader state of the Latin Empire, The Duchy ofAthens, and the Principality ofAchaea. while the Greeks created the successor states of the Despolate of Epirus, the Empire of Nicaea and the Empire of Trebizond. And then the Fourth Crusade went home to Western Europe rich with plunder from Constantinople. They never even attacked Egypt. So instead of fighting the Muslims, the Fourth Crusade attacked the Christian Byzantine Empire. The Crusading movement, which had been started to save the Byzantines from the Muslims actually weakened them. Eventually, Michael VIII Palaiologos, the leader of the
paragraphs.zh: 字军国家，雅典公国和亚加亚公 国。希腊人建立了伊庇鲁斯帝国、 尼西亚帝国和特利比松帝国的继 承国。 第四次十字军回到西欧，从君士坦 丁堡掠夺了大量财物。 他们甚至都没有攻打过埃及。 因此，第四次十字军东征没有与穆 斯林作战，而是袭击了基督教的拜 占庭帝国。 为了从穆斯林手中拯救拜占庭而 发起的十字军运动实际上削弱了 他们。 最终，尼西亚帝国的领袖迈克尔八 世帕里奥洛加斯，打败了拉丁帝

paragraphs.en: Empire of Nicaea was able to recapture Constantinople and defeat the Latin Empire. In 1261 he established the Restored Byzantine Empire. But the Byzantines were now a shadow of their former self. Here is a map of the Eastern Empire in 1263. This is what the empire looked like in 1170. And here is what it looked like in 1270. As you can see Byzantine power was much reduced from what it had been a century before. And then in the 1260s the Mongols arrived. They left the Byzantines alone and instead destroyed the
paragraphs.zh: 国，夺回了君士坦丁堡。 1261 年，他重建了拜占庭帝国。但 是此时的拜占庭只剩了往日辉煌 的一点点影子。 这是 1263 年东罗马帝国的地图。 这是 1170 年帝国的样子。 这是 1270 年的样子。 正如你所看到的，拜占庭帝国的权 力比 100 年前大大减少了。 12 世纪 60 年代，蒙古人来到这里。 他们对拜占庭人置之不理，反而摧 毁了塞尔柱帝国最后的残余——

paragraphs.en: Sultanate of Rum, the last remnant of the Seljuk Empire. The Mongols divided Seljuk territory into several different independent regions called Beyliks. But then in the late 1200s Mongol power began to weaken in the region. One of the Beyliks was led by a man named Osman the First. Osman ruled from 1299 to 1323 and he turned his small Beylik into a strong force in those years. Osman also founded a dynasty of Turkish Sultans which are named after him and called the "Ottoman Turks". As you can see from this map, the original homeland of the Ottomans was just across the Sea of Marmara
paragraphs.zh: 鲁姆苏丹国。 蒙古人把塞尔柱的领土划分成几 个独立的地区，称为贝里克。 但是在 12 世纪后期，蒙古的力量 在该地区开始减弱。 其中一个叫奥斯曼的人领导着贝 里克家族。奥斯曼从 1299 年统治 到 1323 年，他把他的小贝里克变 成了一股强大的力量。 奥斯曼还建立了一个土耳其苏丹 王朝，以他的名字命名，称为“奥 斯曼土耳其人”。 你可以从这张地图上看到，奥斯曼 人的原始家园就在马尔马拉海对 面，从君士坦丁堡的拜占庭那里。

paragraphs.en: from the Byzantines in Constantinople. In 1324 Osman died and was succeeded by his son Orhan Gazi, the second Ottoman Sultan. Orhan continued to expand the borders of the Ottoman lands. During his reign he had two strokes of luck. First, the Byzantine Empire became involved in a civil war from 1341 to 1347 and then another civil war from 1352 - 1357. And then there was an earthquake at Galipoli in 1354, which destroyed the Byzantine fortress there and forced the Greeks to evacuate. So Osman crossed the water and occupied the area. The Greeks lost control of the Daradanelles Strait and the Turks now had a way into
paragraphs.zh: 1324 年，奥斯曼去世，他的儿子奥 尔汗·加齐(Orhan Gazi)继承了王 位。 奥尔汗继续扩张奥斯曼帝国领土 的边界。 在他的统治期间，他有两次好运降 临。首先，拜占庭帝国在 1341 年 到 1347 年间卷入了一场内战，然 后在 1352 年到 1357 年间又卷入了 一场内战。 1354 年加利波利发生地震，摧毁了 拜占庭要塞，迫使希腊人撤离。 于是，奥斯曼直接渡海占领了这一 地区。希腊人失去了对达达尼尔海 峡的控制，土耳其人打开了进入欧 洲的通道。

paragraphs.en: Europe. The Ottoman conquest of Europe had begun. Here is a map of the Ottoman Empire in 1355, just after Orhan's capture of Galipoli. Orhan died in 1362 and was succeeded by his son Murad I, the 3rd Ottoman Sultan. Murad ruled from 1362 to 1389 and he really began pushing the Ottoman Empire into Europe. In 1389 Murad defeated the Serbs at the Battle of Kosovo on June 15th, 1389. For Serbian people that Battle is a day of tragedy that is remembered even today. Here is a map showing all of
paragraphs.zh: 奥斯曼帝国对欧洲的征服正式开 始。 这是 1355 年奥斯曼帝国的地图， 就在 Orhan 占领加里波利之后。 奥尔汗死于 1362 年，由他的儿子 穆拉德一世继承王位，穆拉德一世 是奥斯曼帝国的第三位苏丹。 穆拉德在 1362 年到 1389 年间统 治，他开始将奥斯曼帝国向欧洲扩 张。 1389 年 6 月 15 日，穆拉德在科索 沃战役中击败了塞尔维亚人。 对塞尔维亚人民来说，这场战斗是 一场他们铭记至今的悲剧。 这张地图显示了 1389 年穆拉德征

paragraphs.en: Murad's conquests by 1389. He didn't conquer the Byzantines but he forced Constantinople to pay him tribute as a vassal state. To understand this final collapse of the Byzantines better, here is a map of the Restored Byzantine Empire in 1270, after they had pushed the Crusaders out and retaken Constantinople. And here is the Byzantine Empire 130 years later in 1400, after all of the Ottoman conquests. Pretty much nothing was left except the city of Constantinople itself. But now let's return to the Ottomans. Serbian power was crushed at the Battle of Kosovo. But the Serbians had one great accomplishment: they were able to
paragraphs.zh: 服的所有地区。他没有征服拜占 庭，但他强迫君士坦丁堡作为附属 国向他进贡。 为了更好地理解拜占庭帝国的最 终覆灭，这里有一张 1270 年拜占 庭帝国重建的地图，就在他们赶走 十字军并夺回君士坦丁堡之后。 这是 130 年后的 1400 年的拜占庭 帝国，在奥斯曼征服之后。除了君 士坦丁堡城，几乎什么也没留下。 现在让我们回到奥斯曼帝国。塞尔 维亚的势力在科索沃之战中被粉 碎。 但是塞尔维亚人做成了一件事情: 他们在战斗中成功刺杀了穆拉德。

paragraphs.en: assassinate Murad during the battle. So Murad died on the battle field and power passed to his son Bayezid I. Bayezid was an excellent general, and he conquered Bulgaria and northern Greece, and then he put Constantinople under siege in 1394. At this point Western Europe began to realize the danger that these new Ottoman Turks posed. So they organized the last great Crusade of the MiddleAges to help the Hungarians in their war. French soldiers travelled east, met up with the Hungarian and Imperial army and went east in search of Bayezid. They found him at Nicopolis and a great battle began. Unfortunately, the French Knights were too proud
paragraphs.zh: 穆拉德死于战场，权力传给了他的 儿子巴耶济德一世。 巴耶济德是一位杰出的将军，他征 服了保加利亚和希腊北部，并于 1394 年围攻君士坦丁堡。 此时西欧开始意识到这些新奥斯 曼土耳其人带来的危险。 因此，他们组织了中世纪最后一次 十字军东征，帮助匈牙利人进行战 斗。法国士兵向东行进，遇到匈牙 利和帝国军队，向东寻找巴耶济 德。 他们在尼科波利斯遭遇，立即展开 大战。不幸的是，法国骑士太骄傲 了，他们没有听匈牙利人的忠告，

paragraphs.en: to listen to the Hungarians and rode off to fight on their own. This was a big mistake and led to their defeat. The Crusader army was crushed at the Battle of Nicopolis on September 25th, 1396. After the battle of Nicopolis, Bayzezid returned to his siege of Constantinople. But then a new threat appeared. It was a Turkish-Mongolian army lead by a man named Timur who claimed a family connection to Genghis Khan. Timur began attacking the Ottomans from the east. So Bayezid rushed east to meet him in battle. Bayezid and Timur fought each other at the Battle ofAnkara on July 20th 1402.
paragraphs.zh: 脱离了大部队，独立战斗。 这个巨大的失误直接导致了他们 的失败。1396 年 9 月 25 日，十字 军在尼科波利斯战役中被击溃。 尼科波利斯战役之后，巴耶济德回 到了他对君士坦丁堡的围攻中。 但随后出现了新的威胁。这是一支 土耳其-蒙古军队，由一个叫帖木 儿的人领导，他声称自己是成吉思 汗后裔。 帖木儿开始从东方攻击奥斯曼人。 于是巴耶济德东进与他交战。 1402 年 7 月 20 日，巴耶济德和帖 木儿在安卡拉交战。

paragraphs.en: The Battle was a victory for Timur and Bayezid was captured. Bayezid became Timur's prisoner and died in captivity a few months later in March 1403. By the Time Timur died in 1405, he had built up a great Empire, mostly centered on Persia. His empire would last for another century before falling in the early 1500s. Meanwhile Bayezid's capture created a crisis for the Ottoman Empire. His sons Mehmed, Isa, Musa, Suleyman, and Mustafa each claimed the throne for themselves. ACivil War resulted which lasted for 11 years from 1402 - 1413. In Turkish history this is known as the Ottoman Interregnum.
paragraphs.zh: 这场战役的结果是帖木儿胜利，巴 耶济德被俘。 巴耶济德成为帖木儿的俘虏，并于 几个月后的 1403 年 3 月死于囚禁。 1405 年帖木儿去世时，他已经建立 了一个以波斯为中心的帝国。他的 帝国持续了一个世纪，直到 16 世 纪初灭亡。 与此同时，巴耶济德的被俘给奥斯 曼帝国带来了一场危机。他的儿子 穆罕默德、伊萨、穆萨、苏莱曼和 穆斯塔法都宣称要继承王位。 从 1402 年到 1413 年，内战持续了 11 年。在土耳其历史上，这被称为 奥斯曼帝国的过渡期。

paragraphs.en: For the Byzantines this Civil War was a blessing since it took Turkish pressure off of them! The Ottoman Civil War ended at the Battle of Çamurlu on July 5th, 1413. Mehmed Celebi emerged victorious and became Mehmed the First, the 5th Ottoman Sultan. During his reign, Mehmed mostly dealt with putting down rebellions, stabilizing the empire and consolidating the territory that his father had captured. Mehmed I died in 1421 and was succeeded by his son Murad the Second. Murad II ruled from 1421 until continued his father project of stabilizing the empire 1451, so he spent most of his time dealing with
paragraphs.zh: 对拜占庭人来说，土耳其内战是一 大幸事，它让拜占庭压力顿消! 1413 年 7 月 5 日，奥斯曼内战在卡 穆尔卢战役中结束。 穆罕默德取得了胜利，成为了穆罕 默德一世，第 5 个奥斯曼苏丹。 在他的统治期间，穆罕默德主要负 责镇压叛乱，稳定帝国，巩固他父 亲占领的领土。 穆罕默德一世死于 1421 年，继位 的是他的儿子穆拉德二世。 穆拉德二世从 1421 年开始统治， 直到 1451 年，他父亲 稳定帝国的 计划得以继续，他大部分时间都在 处理巴尔干半岛和安纳托利亚的

paragraphs.en: rebellions in the Balkans and in Anatolia. Murad II died on February 3rd, 1451 and was succeeded by his 18-year-old-son, Mehmed II, the 7th Ottoman Sultan. Mehmed was determined to do what none of his ancestors had accomplished, finally conquer Constantinople. Now as we've learned, Constantinople's walls had stood ever since the reign of Theodosius II in 313AD. For over 1000 years they had kept the city safe in siege after siege. But their end was drawing near. The world was changing. By 1453 the age of gunpowder had
paragraphs.zh: 叛乱。 穆拉德二世于 1451 年 2 月 3 日去 世，继位的是他 18 岁的儿子，奥 斯曼帝国第七任苏丹穆罕默德二 世。 穆罕穆德二世决心做前人都没有 做过的事情，最终征服君士坦丁 堡。 据我们所知，君士坦丁堡的城墙从 狄奥多西二世公元313 年起就一直 屹立不倒。 1000 多年来，他们在一次又一次的 围困中保卫着这座城市的安全。 但是他们的末日即将来临。 这时 的世界已经大不同。 到了 1453 年，火药时代开始了，

paragraphs.en: begun, and Murad had prepared cannons to knock down the walls of the city. This included dozens of smaller cannons and one giant super-canon. This massive gun was 8 meters long and could hurl a 270 kg stone ball over a mile. In addition to his super-cannon, Mehmed had 80,000 regular soldiers, 10,000 elite Janissary troops, 1500 Serbian cavalry, dozens of cannons all supported by a fleet of 120 ships. The Byzantine defenders, led by Constantine XI had just 10,000 soldiers and 26 ships. Once his force was assembled, Mehmed began the final siege of Constantinople onApril 6th, 1453.
paragraphs.zh: 穆罕默德二世已经准备好了大炮 来摧毁城墙。其中包括数十门小型 大炮和一门巨型大炮。 这尊大炮有 8 米长，能将一个 270 公斤重的石球投掷 1 英里。 除了他的超级大炮，他还有 8 万名 正规军，1 万名精锐的亲信部队， 1500 名塞尔维亚骑兵，几十门大 炮，全部由 120 艘船组成的舰队支 援。 由康斯坦丁十一世率领的拜占庭 保卫者只有 1 万名士兵和 26 艘船。 1453年4月6日，他的部队集结后， 穆罕默德开始了对君士坦丁堡的 最后一次围攻。

paragraphs.en: Mehmed offered Constantine the option of surrender and a job ruling a small town in Greece called Mystra. But Constantine replied. "To surrender the city to you is beyond my authority or anyone else's who lives in it, for all of us, after taking the mutual decision, shall die of our own free will without trying to save our lives." And so the battle began. For 53 days, fromApril 6th until May 29th Mehmed's cannons began to relentlessly pound the walls of Constantinople, while the defenders tried desperately to repair them. At the same time Mehemed needed to get his ships into the golden horn to attack Constantinople from that side. But he could not do it because
paragraphs.zh: 穆罕默德让康斯坦丁十一世投降， 并分给他一个名为密斯特拉的希 腊小镇。但是康斯坦丁说。 “把这座城市交给你们，不是我或 住在这座城市里的任何人的权力 范围，因为我们所有人，已经共同 作出决定，都愿为城而死，不愿苟 活。” 于是战争开始了。 从4月6日到5月29日的53天里， 穆罕默德的大炮开始无情地轰炸 君士坦丁堡的城墙，而守军则拼命 地试图修复城墙。 与此同时，Mehemed 需要把他的船 开进金角湾，从那边攻击君士坦丁 堡。但他做不到，因为有一根铁链 横跨港口。

paragraphs.en: of a chain stretched across the harbor. so he constructed a road and simply rolled his ships overland. And his navy entered the Golden Horn that way. Now there was no escape for the Byzantines. Those faithful walls held out for 7 weeks, but they had been built in the age of swords and arrows, they had never been designed to resist cannons.And after 53 days, a breach was finally opened in the walls of the city. And then, the final assault began. The Byzantines put up a brave fight, but they were hopelessly outnumbered. When Constantine XI saw that the battle was lost he said these final
paragraphs.zh: 所以他建了一条路，然后把他的船 滚到陆地上。 他的海军就这样进入了金角湾。拜 占庭人无处可逃。 这些忠实的城墙可以支撑 7 个星 期，但它们是在冷兵器时代建造 的，从来没有设计用来抵抗大炮。 过了 53 天，城墙上终于裂开了一 道口子。 就这样，最后的攻击开始了。拜占 庭人发起了一场勇敢的战斗，但双 方的力量实在是太悬殊了。 当康斯坦丁十一世眼看战败，留下 了以下遗言:

paragraphs.en: words: "The city is fallen and I am still alive." And stripping off his imperial ornaments, he led one final charge against the enemy. His body was never found. Perhaps fittingly, the last Roman Emperor died fighting with his men in the defense of his country on May 29th, 1453. For three days Mehmed let his soldiers plunder Constantinople to their hearts’content. But then on June 2nd 1453 he ordered all plundering to stop and entered Constantinople. Mehmed went the the Hagia Sophia, said his prayers and had it converted into a mosque. Soon he had his men
paragraphs.zh: “城破了，而我还活着。” 他摘下身上所有的饰物，向敌人发 起最后一次进攻。连尸身也没留下 来。 这也许就叫死得其所吧，最后一位 罗马皇帝在 1453 年 5 月 29 日与他 的士兵以身殉国。 接下来的三天，穆罕默德任由他的 士兵在君士坦丁堡里肆意抢掠。但 在 1453 年 6 月 2 日，他下令停止 一切掠夺行为，进入君士坦丁堡。 穆罕默德去了圣索菲亚大教堂祈 祷，并把它变成了一座清真寺。不 久，他让他的人把所有的图标和马

paragraphs.en: paint over all the icons and mosaics, which actually preserved them! But otherwise, Mehmed let the Greek Orthodox Church continue to function. But he made sure to pick its leader from now on. Constantinople, the Queen of the Cities now became the Capital of the Ottoman Empire. And this is a good place to end our series, because the Fall of Constantinople on May 29th, 1453 marks the final end of Eastern Roman Empire. The MiddleAges began with the fall of the Western Roman Empire, and it ended with the fall of the Eastern Roman Empire almost 1000 years later. The next 80 years, really just a long
paragraphs.zh: 赛克都涂抹掉，而实际上让图标和 马赛克无意间得到保存。 但除此之外，穆罕默德让希腊东正 教会继续运作，但主教得由他来决 定。 君士坦丁堡，城市之王，现在成为 奥斯曼帝国的首都。 这是结束这一系列讲座的好地方， 因为 1453 年 5 月 29 日君士坦丁堡 的沦陷标志着东罗马帝国的终结。 中世纪开始于西罗马帝国的灭亡， 结束于近 1000 年后东罗马帝国的 灭亡。 在接下来的 80 年，就像人类漫长

paragraphs.en: human lifetime, would see the High Renaissance, the arrival of the printing press, the Discovery of America, the Copernican Revolution and the Protestant Reformation. The Modern world had begun. But that is the story of our next series on the modern world. I hope you will be joining us for that.And I am looking forward to it... ...just as soon as I get done with the research! Okay everyone, I hope you enjoyed that lesson. If so I have a recommendation. Since we will soon be learning about the modern world. I recommend the books The Cartoon History of the Modern World I and
paragraphs.zh: 的一生，见证了文艺复兴，印刷术 的出现，美国的发现，哥白尼革命 和新教改革。 现代世界已经开始。 这也就是我们下一期关于现代世 界的故事了。我希望你能加入我 们。我很期待…… …只要我做完研究! 大家好，希望你们喜欢这堂课。如 果是的话，我有一个建议。 因为我们很快就会了解现代世界。 我推荐拉里·戈尼克的《卡通现代 世界史 I 和 II》。

paragraphs.en: II by Larry Gonick. Thank you very much!
paragraphs.zh: 非常感谢!
